entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop studied for resistance to early leaf spot.

entities.name: LABORATORY SCREENING TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A technique using whole plants to determine resistance to Cercospora arachidicola.

entities.name: EARLY LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A disease caused by Cercospora arachidicola in groundnuts.

entities.name: EARLY LEAF SPOT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut cultivars to resist infection by Cercospora arachidicola.

entities.name: CERCOSPORA ARACHIDICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for early leaf spot in groundnuts.

entities.name: INOCULUM CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The amount of conidia per millilitre used during the inoculation process.

entities.name: NUMBER OF LESIONS
entities.description: A disease component used to measure the severity of early leaf spot.

entities.name: PERCENTAGE LEAF AREA DAMAGED
entities.description: A disease component measuring the extent of leaf damage caused by the pathogen.

entities.name: PERCENTAGE DEFOLIATION
entities.description: A disease component measuring the loss of leaves due to infection.

entities.name: NUMBER OF CONIDIA PER LESION
entities.description: A metric used to distinguish between susceptible and resistant genotypes.
